meta.title: Grimheart — Daggerheart Character Sheets
meta.description: Create and manage your Daggerheart characters.

app.name: Grimheart
app.tagline: Build and manage your Daggerheart characters.

home.title: Your Daggerheart character sheets, anywhere.
home.subtitle: Create heroes, choose your class and domains, draw cards, level up — all in one place.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your roster of heroes.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start building characters.
auth.usernameHint: 3–20 characters. Letters, numbers and _ only, starting with a letter.
auth.pinHint: A 4-digit PIN you'll use to sign in.
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.usernameShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.usernameLong: Username must be at most 20 characters.
errors.usernameInvalid: Use only letters, numbers and _, starting with a letter.
errors.locked: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

characters.title: Your Characters
characters.subtitle: Manage your Daggerheart roster
characters.emptyHint: Create your first character to start your adventure.

identity.title: Who are you?
identity.subtitle: Give your character a name and pronouns.
identity.name: Character name

class.title: Choose Your Class
class.subtitle: Your class defines your role and the domains you draw from.

traits.title: Assign Traits
traits.subtitle: Distribute these modifiers across your six traits.
traits.hint: Select a modifier, then tap a trait to assign it.

cards.title: Domain Cards
cards.subtitle: Choose 2 level-1 cards from your class's domains.

equipment.title: Starting Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Choose your weapons and armor.
equipment.noArmorHint: Requires the Bare Bones card (Valor domain)

background.title: Your Experiences
background.subtitle: Create two Experiences that shaped your character. Each grants a +2 bonus to relevant rolls.
background.expHint: A word or phrase that captures a skill or area of expertise.
background.expNote: Experiences are personal — no list defines them. Choose something that captures who your character is and what they've done. Each one gives you +2 on any roll where it's relevant.

review.title: Ready?
review.subtitle: Review your character, then bring them to life.

class.bard_desc: Masters of captivation and performance who thrive in social situations.
class.druid_desc: Channelers of the wilderness who transform into beasts and shape nature.
class.guardian_desc: Frontline defenders who rush headfirst and protect allies with their lives.
class.ranger_desc: Expert hunters with deadly precision and a deep bond with the wild.
class.rogue_desc: Masters of stealth, trickery, and social manipulation.
class.seraph_desc: Warriors of divine power wielding legendary weapons or taking flight.
class.sorcerer_desc: Channelers of raw magic with versatile and potent spells.
class.warrior_desc: Relentless fighters who dominate the battlefield through sheer force.
class.wizard_desc: Scholars of magic who wield knowledge to unlock extraordinary power.

subclass.troubadour_desc: Play music to bolster your allies.
subclass.wordsmith_desc: Use clever wordplay and captivate crowds.
subclass.wardenElements_desc: Embody the natural elements of the wild.
subclass.wardenRenewal_desc: Use powerful magic to heal your party.
subclass.stalwart_desc: Take heavy blows and keep fighting.
subclass.vengeance_desc: Strike down enemies who harm you or your allies.
subclass.beastbound_desc: Form a deep bond with an animal companion.
subclass.wayfinder_desc: Hunt your prey and strike with deadly force.
subclass.nightwalker_desc: Manipulate shadows to maneuver through the environment.
subclass.syndicate_desc: Have a web of contacts everywhere you go.
subclass.divineWielder_desc: Dominate the battlefield with a legendary weapon.
subclass.wingedSentinel_desc: Take flight and strike crushing blows from the sky.
subclass.elementalOrigin_desc: Channel the raw power of a particular element.
subclass.primalOrigin_desc: Extend the versatility of your spells in powerful ways.
subclass.callBrave_desc: Use the might of your enemies to fuel your own power.
subclass.callSlayer_desc: Strike down adversaries with immense force.
subclass.schoolKnowledge_desc: Gain a keen understanding of the world around you.

ancestry.clank_desc: Sentient mechanical beings built from metal, wood, and stone.
ancestry.drakona_desc: Wingless dragons in humanoid form with elemental breath.
ancestry.dwarf_desc: Short, dense humanoids with thick hair and natural resilience.
ancestry.elf_desc: Tall humanoids with pointed ears and acutely attuned senses.
ancestry.faerie_desc: Winged humanoids with insectile features and metamorphic forms.
ancestry.faun_desc: Humanoid goats with curving horns and powerful cloven hooves.
ancestry.firbolg_desc: Large, gentle forest guardians with innate fey magic.
ancestry.fungril_desc: Mycelial beings deeply connected to the forest floor.
ancestry.galapa_desc: Turtle-like people with sturdy shells and ancient wisdom.
ancestry.giant_desc: Towering humanoids of immense strength and endurance.
ancestry.goblin_desc: Small, clever beings with a talent for improvisation.
ancestry.halfling_desc: Small, nimble folk with unshakeable luck.
ancestry.human_desc: Adaptable and resourceful, excelling through determination.
ancestry.infernis_desc: Fiendish descendants with a touch of infernal power.
ancestry.katari_desc: Feline humanoids with keen senses and swift reflexes.
ancestry.orc_desc: Powerful warriors with great endurance and fierce loyalty.
ancestry.ribbet_desc: Amphibious beings equally at home on land or in water.
ancestry.simiah_desc: Primate-like humanoids with remarkable agility and curiosity.

community.highborne_desc: Born into privilege and wealth, shaped by luxury and politics.
community.loreborne_desc: Raised among scholars, libraries, and the pursuit of knowledge.
community.orderborne_desc: Formed by structure, discipline, and the rule of law.
community.ridgeborne_desc: Hardened by mountain living and the harshness of high places.
community.seaborne_desc: Shaped by the ocean, seafaring, and life on the water.
community.slyborne_desc: Raised in the underworld of thieves, merchants, and secrets.
community.underborne_desc: Formed by subterranean life in caves, tunnels, and darkness.
community.wanderborne_desc: Raised as nomads, always moving and adapting to new places.
community.wildborne_desc: Shaped by untamed nature, far from civilization.

domain.arcana_desc: Innate and instinctual magic channeling raw arcane forces.
domain.blade_desc: Weapon mastery and the art of defeating foes in combat.
domain.bone_desc: Tactics, body control, and predicting enemies in battle.
domain.codex_desc: Intensive magical study through books, scrolls, and ancient texts.
domain.grace_desc: Charisma, storytelling, and bending perception to your will.
domain.midnight_desc: Shadows, secrecy, and the art of obscurity.
domain.sage_desc: The natural world and the raw magic of earth and creature.
domain.splendor_desc: Life, healing, and the extraordinary power over death.
domain.valor_desc: Protection, fortitude, and strength in defense of others.

card.arcana_rune_ward_desc: Infuse a trinket with protective magic. Its holder can spend Hope to reduce incoming damage by 1d8.
card.arcana_unleash_chaos_desc: Place tokens equal to Spellcast on this card. Spend tokens to deal that many d10s of magic damage to a Far target.
card.arcana_wall_walk_desc: Spend Hope to let a touched creature walk on walls and ceilings until end of scene.
card.blade_get_back_up_desc: When you take Severe damage, mark a Stress to reduce it by one threshold.
card.blade_not_good_enough_desc: When you roll damage, reroll any 1s or 2s.
card.blade_whirlwind_desc: On a hit within Very Close range, spend Hope to hit all other nearby enemies for half damage.
card.bone_deft_maneuvers_desc: Once per rest, sprint anywhere within Far range and gain +1 to attack if you engage immediately.
card.bone_i_see_it_coming_desc: When targeted from beyond Melee range, mark Stress to roll a d4 and add it to your Evasion.
card.bone_untouchable_desc: Gain a bonus to your Evasion equal to half your Agility.
card.codex_book_of_ava_desc: Three spells: Power Push (knock back + magic damage), Tava's Armor (+1 Armor Score), Ice Spike (conjure and strike with ice).
card.codex_book_of_illiat_desc: Three spells: Slumber (put a target to sleep), Arcane Barrage (spend Hope for d6 magic damage each), Telepathy (mental link).
card.codex_book_of_tyfar_desc: Three spells: Wild Flame (2d6 to nearby foes), Magic Hand (conjure a hand), Mysterious Mist (heavy obscuring fog).
card.grace_deft_deceiver_desc: Spend Hope to gain advantage on rolls to deceive or trick someone into believing a lie.
card.grace_enrapture_desc: Make a Spellcast Roll against a Close target. On success, they're Enraptured — attention fixed on you.
card.grace_inspirational_desc: After a rest, place tokens equal to Presence on this card. Spend tokens to clear Stress, heal HP, or grant Hope to allies.
card.midnight_pick_pull_desc: Advantage on rolls to pick non-magical locks, disarm traps, or steal items.
card.midnight_rain_blades_desc: Spend Hope to conjure throwing blades that strike all targets within Very Close range for d8+2 magic damage.
card.midnight_disguise_desc: Mark Stress to disguise yourself as any humanoid you can picture, with advantage on Presence rolls to avoid scrutiny.
card.sage_gifted_tracker_desc: Spend Hope to ask the GM questions about tracked creatures. Gain +1 Evasion against them.
card.sage_natures_tongue_desc: Speak with plants and animals (Instinct 12). Gain +2 to Spellcast Rolls in natural environments.
card.sage_vicious_entangle_desc: Roots deal 1d8+1 and Restrain a Far target. Spend Hope to Restrain another nearby target.
card.splendor_bolt_beacon_desc: Spend Hope to deal d8+2 magic damage and make a Far target Vulnerable and glowing.
card.splendor_mending_touch_desc: Spend 2 Hope to clear a Hit Point or Stress on a touched creature.
card.splendor_reassurance_desc: Once per rest, after an ally attempts a roll, let them reroll their dice.
card.valor_bare_bones_desc: Without armor, gain Armor Score 3+Strength and natural damage thresholds by tier.
card.valor_forceful_push_desc: On a hit, knock target to Close range. Hope adds d6 damage and optionally Vulnerable.
card.valor_i_am_shield_desc: When a Very Close ally would take damage, mark Stress to intercept and take the attack yourself.

equipFeature.massive: Massive: −1 Evasion; extra damage die on hit (discard lowest)
equipFeature.quick: Quick: mark Stress to target another creature
equipFeature.returning: Returning: returns to hand after attack
equipFeature.paired: Paired: +2 to primary damage within Melee
equipFeature.startling: Startling: force adjacent foes to Close
equipFeature.hooked: Hooked: pull target to Melee on hit
